summary: Tested video upload support in Live Sessions and Video Pricing collapsible section in Session Rates & Settings modal. All 9 requested features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Video Pricing section correctly placed below Photo Pricing in Settings Modal
Video pricing mode toggle (Standard Rates vs Promotional) mirrors Photo Pricing pattern
720p/1080p/4K tier inputs properly implemented with default values ($8/$15/$30)
Promotional mode shows 'All 4K Quality' badge and single flat rate input
PhotoUploadModal correctly accepts video/* files with 100MB limit
Backend /api/photos/upload endpoint properly handles video MIME types and sets media_type='video'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video upload support and Video Pricing section fully tested. Key flows: 1) Login as photographer -> Photo Tools -> Live Sessions, 2) Edit button opens Settings Modal with Video Pricing collapsible section, 3) Video Pricing has Standard Rates (720p/1080p/4K) and Promotional toggle, 4) PhotoUploadModal accepts video/* files (MP4, MOV, WebM) with 100MB limit, 5) Backend /api/photos/upload correctly handles video uploads and sets media_type='video'.

login_as_photographer.description: Successfully logged in as photographer@surf.com / password123

navigate_to_sessions.description: Navigated to Live Sessions page via Photo Tools -> Live Sessions

edit_button_opens_modal.description: Edit button opens Session Rates & Settings modal

video_pricing_section_exists.description: Video Pricing collapsible section exists below Photo Pricing

video_pricing_standard_rates_toggle.description: Standard Rates button shows 720p/1080p/4K tier inputs

video_pricing_promotional_toggle.description: Promotional button shows single flat rate input with 'All 4K Quality' badge

video_tier_inputs.description: 720p HD ($8), 1080p Full HD ($15), 4K Ultra HD ($30) tier inputs present

photo_upload_modal_accepts_video.description: PhotoUploadModal accepts video/* files (MP4, MOV, WebM) with 100MB limit

backend_video_upload_api.description: POST /api/photos/upload accepts video/mp4 content-type and returns media_type='video'

video_pricing_section.header: Video Pricing with Per Video badge
